posts.author: popjaco (Poppy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

You should be able to have settings on viewing and editing on the same column

What are you trying to achieve

I want to be able to restrict guests from viewing a column in a shareable board, but I also want to restrict editing on that column to a certain team. It’s an approval column, so I don’t want our external users even seeing that it’s there, and I don’t want everyone in the company being able to set the status to approved.
